textByHash.095475f1f1e162c58824f351939ca36a57010ddc: You can make all sorts of things from clay, if you have the crafting skill. Rune Essence is used for magic to cast spells.
textByHash.1b2e335c26aff0bb8602255fefa901b28516fafc: To mine, simply click on the rock to mine it, while you've got a pickaxe with you.
textByHash.1d9ad235698fc254ed21bc4936465295c95a87d6: When you have a full inventory, take it to the bank. There's a bank on the roof of the castle in Lumbridge.
textByHash.203a976fecbf1e16c1745db21b8bf679c363ae36: Hello there, Zanik! You look like you know your iron from your silver!
textByHash.25386d39c66f69e27b124dad8eb9299b536b3b67: You can tell the ore you'll get from a rock by looking at it. The colour of the rock helps, too.
textByHash.2e9224b86658f4bca0ddfac170d846402fdaafc3: You don't look like you need any help, then. What about you?
textByHash.3503df5579eb866f8db645161a36e57df168b835: I could show you where the mining guild is on your map if you like?
textByHash.47e8dcd19bd0279467fa268a68ce95d3ba1af67f: You might also like to check out the coal mine west of Seers' village. This will enable you to use the coal trucks.
textByHash.527765a6f14dfd57bf9910cf08da416f9a578d67: Be careful though, the scorpions in the mine will attack you.
textByHash.5a3a45e6c69f693e8cb6fda577ddb6b99854b35c: Investigate the mining guild, the entrance to this is in the east of Falador down some steps. It could be most useful to you!
textByHash.609310527323e6c313744a46b3252c8053834bf4: I could show you where Al Kharid mine is on your map if you like?
textByHash.6f1448aab76391b2cb797d097c30779de390cc8d: I'd give you a pick to mine the rocks around me, but you don't have room in your inventory.
textByHash.76f5b361ca355731fd99a6130efc8a50f34b008c: You could investigate the Dig Site east of Varrock, I'm sure you'll find something rewarding there.
textByHash.859dce5dc7f753d8938ee9862f24ed69cb7edc71: Oh yes, if you haven't already, speak to Doric who can be found around the anvils north of Falador. I'm sure he can help you out.
textByHash.a668c68e3103023c35d821e60259c85e611e3b78: You can get different rocks in different places throughout the land, explore and find them.
textByHash.d5f467bd94a516adefd7a603c1851653c3238ae2: As you already have a pick, you can mine the rocks around me.
textByHash.d860afbf5249f7eb856ace3ec4557784b823417f: I could show you where either of the places are on your map if you like?
textByHash.df771500f4299fceb0858e29af2e0f35bb5bacdf: You could start by traveling to the Al Kharid mine. Follow the path north and pay the 10 coins toll to go through the gate. Head north after passing through the gate and you will find the mine.
textByHash.f9f4fb147bc2b9d17ba6878a8df1ba225ca033f1: As you're already here, have a pick so that you can mine the rocks around me.
